name: secure-cloud-agents
description: System-wide access to this repository's secure cloud agent suite: 34 specialist roles, orchestration skills, and the shared knowledge store, reachable from any project once installed at global scope.

interface.shortDescription: System-wide secure cloud agent suite and orchestration.
interface.longDescription: Makes 34 specialist roles, orchestration skills, knowledge-store retrieval, and the secure-cloud Agentic SDLC provider available as a self-contained package.
defaultPrompt: Use run-agent-orchestration to review this task through the secure cloud agent suite.
Ingest or retrieve context from the shared knowledge store.
